content:
Evidence for everyday decisions #Official statistics, scientific research, transparent calculations, and reproducible Python analysis that answer practical questions about everyday life.
Why Everyday Data? #Small everyday actions often feel insignificant.
This project examines whether they actually make a measurable difference using public datasets, scientific literature, and transparent calculations.
Every research project follows the same methodology:
📊 Official data sources 🐍 Python (Pandas) analysis 📈 Clear visualizations 🔍 Transparent assumptions 📚 Scientific references Current Research #🌍 Environmental Impact #Project 001
Research question
What is the environmental impact of turning off the tap while brushing your teeth for one year?
Status
🚧 Research in progress
Publication coming soon.
Methodology #Every project follows the same workflow:
Define the research question Collect official data Document assumptions Analyze data with Python Create visualizations Publish findings with full transparency
title: Everyday Data

content:
Last updated: July 22, 2026
Your privacy matters.
Everyday Data is an independent educational and research project. This website is designed to collect as little personal information as possible.
Information We Collect #This website does not require user accounts and does not intentionally collect personal information from visitors.
If you contact me through LinkedIn or GitHub, your information is handled according to the privacy policies of those platforms.
Cookies #This website does not use advertising cookies.
If analytics are added in the future, this Privacy page will be updated accordingly.
External Links #This website contains links to third-party websites such as GitHub and LinkedIn. Those websites have their own privacy policies and practices.
Copyright #Unless otherwise stated, all original text, calculations, figures, visualizations and source code published on Everyday Data are the intellectual property of the author.
Where external data is used, the original source is always cited.
Acknowledgments #Everyday Data is an independent project created by Mojca Jan. I would also like to acknowledge ChatGPT for being an invaluable collaborator throughout the development of this project. From the first website setup to research planning and programming, its assistance significantly accelerated the work and helped transform ideas into reality. All research design, methodology, data analysis, calculations, conclusions and editorial decisions remain the responsibility of the author.
Contact #If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or the content of this website, you are welcome to contact me through my LinkedIn profile.
Thank you for visiting Everyday Data.
title: Privacy

content:
Welcome to the Everyday Data research library.
Each project begins with a real-world question and follows the same process:
Define the question Collect reliable data Analyze the data with Python Create visualizations Explain the results in plain language Categories #Research projects may belong to more than one category.
Examples include:
Environment Health Energy Food Consumer Habits Finance Society Technology Latest Research #The first project is currently being prepared.
Stay tuned!
title: Research
